sections.paragraph: f. Son 5:13 6:2 Eze 17:7, 10 Eze 17:10 areola, bed of a garden or vineyard, raised up in the middle (erhöhtes Gartenbeet, Blumenberg; from the root עָרַג). So the old interpreters. Others understand it to be a ladder, trellis, for training plants against. Compare Arab. مَعِْرجُ a ladder; but the former explanation is preferable.
